meaning: adj.不信神的,不敬神的,无神论者的
examples: She began to howl quite horribly, but Gretel ran away and the godless witch was miserably burnt to death.
The words were hardly out of her mouth when the godless crew returned, dragging another young girl along with them.
To the churchmen, he was a godless atheist.
Justice does not entail a godless Leviathan commandeering business even if some Christians like the outcomes.
But godless, we seek instead unconditional love from our fellow humans.
